creator: zab@zltech.eu
text:
Mantis version 2.24.4 fixes many security issues:
https://mantisbt.org/bugs/changelog_page.php?project=mantisbt&version=2.24.4

I created a patch for version update.
Changes:
- version to 2.24.4
- plugins/Announce & source-integration to their newer versions

QA:
- portlint: no new warns/errors
- poudriere: ok (11.4R, 12.2R, 13-CURRENT, with/without my,pg,plugins)
- fresh install: works well (12.2-RELEASE)
- update existing mantis 2.24.3 system to 2.24.4: no changes seen in user flows
- database schema: unchanged (checked on pg-12)

VuXML entry is on its way in a separate PR: #252612
